title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manipal University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manipal University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
